item.description: 1-5 is a track released by scribble t on August 25, 2022. Artist scribble t Release 1-5 Genre(s) Electronica, Post-classical Published August 25, 2022 Bandcamp 1-5 About 1-5 was performed as an improvisation on a modular synthesizer.

4-6 is a track released by scribble t on November 25, 2022. Artist scribble t Release 4-6 Genre(s) Electronica, Post-classical Published November 25, 2022 Bandcamp 4-6 About 4-6 was performed as an improvisation on a modular synthesizer.
